title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 25 curation claim opened
body: Opened claim bd6a0005-f3ec-4e36-b43d-25ebb384b55a for dedicated knowledge curation batch 25. Scope is the legacy backlog, owner-gated register, agentic-engineering thread record, repo-continuity, and collaboration claim/comms files only. Live state before claim: 0 active claims and 0 open commit intents. Batch candidates: R4-new commit-boundary enforcement; commit-queue UX structural cure; agent-tools CLI architectural overhaul; E-1/E-2 advisory hooks and agent-tools git passthrough; coordination-artefact isolation. Processing in place only; no archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
